perspectives.body: 🚨 BREAKING: The Trump admin has CONFIRMED an American has tested POSITIVE for Ebola, but they will NOT be brought back to the US They will be treated in GERMANY The CDC also confirmed they implemented a TRAVEL BAN on foreigners who've passed through Uganda, Congo, and South Sudan.

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: Nach Hantavirus-Pleite: WHO schürt neue Ebola-Panik Zuerst gab es die Panikmache um Hantavirus und jetzt ist es Ebola. Die WHO hat gerade wegen eines seltenen Ebola-Stamms, der in der Demokratischen Republik Kongo und in Uganda Dutzende Menschen das Leben gekostet hat, einen internationalen Gesundheitsnotstand ausgerufen.

stories.headline: Tensions rise over attacks and threats to shipping in Strait of Hormuz

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: 🚨 Retired Navy Capt. @brentdsadler dropping HARD TRUTH: This “fragile peace” with Iran is a JOKE, the regime won’t cough up real concessions without MORE U.S. MILITARY FORCE. Iran is still THREATENING the Strait of Hormuz and global oil trade.

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: Sen. Lindsey Graham told NBC that keeping the Strait of Hormuz closed while pursuing a deal that will never materialize only strengthens Iran. Graham called on Trump to "weaken them even more."

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: 🇮🇷 Iranian strikes targeting ships passing through the Strait of Hormuz are once again shaking global headlines 💥🔥 One of the world’s most strategic waterways remains at the center of rising tensions, proving yet again how quickly the balance of power can shift in the Gulf.

✨샐러디 선재스님 당근국수✨

평점: 9/10

요즘 유행하는 천연 위고비 중 가장 건강한 제품인거 같소이다. 당근의 은은한 단맛과 취나물의 산뜻한 향, 그리고 버섯의 풍미가 조화로운데 끝맛에 올라오는 고추간장소스의 조미료가 맛의 균형을 잡아주는 느낌이었소. 7900원

stories.headline: Massive wildfire explodes in Southern California with 1,300 acres burned and 30,000 evacuated
stories.body:
🚨UPDATE: MASSIVE WILDFIRE EXPLODING in Southern California — 1,300+ Acres Burned, 30,000 People Evacuated, Thousands of Homes Threatened

Flames ripping through the area northwest of L.A. 500 firefighters battling it as residents flee in terror: “Whole area was in flames… smoke everywhere.”

Super dry conditions + years of Democrat incompetence = annual disaster.

California’s radical green policies, zero forest management, and “let nature burn” insanity have turned the state into a tinderbox every single year.

Newsom collects the highest taxes in America and still can’t stop the state from catching fire.

Prayers up for the brave firefighters and the families forced to evacuate.

stories.headline: Discussion on why conspiracy theories spread and public distrust
stories.body:
Conspiracy theories are easy to dismiss, but public distrust is more complicated than that. 

This video explores why suspicion spreads, where healthy questioning becomes dangerous, and why some real history still shapes what people believe.
